sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - BERTA di Clavesana (-after 1224).
Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - BERTA di Clavesana heiress of Mambarasco e Cortemiglia, daughter of BONIFAZIO Marchese di Clavesana & his wife ---.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Berta di Clavesana於1182年出生時，她的父親Bonifacio I del Vasto, Marquis of Clavesana43歲，母親Hélène de Bergame28歲。她於1202年8月9日與William VI Marquess of Montferrat結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1224年享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Berta di Clavesana于1182年出生时，她的父亲Bonifacio I del Vasto, Marquis of Clavesana43岁，母亲Hélène de Bergame28岁。她于1202年8月9日与William VI Marquess of Montferrat结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1224年享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: di
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mandarin form of the surname 狄, a term referring to the tribes in ancient northern China: (i) from Di (狄), the name of an ancient state (thought to have been located in Hebei or Shandong province), which was granted to Xiao Bo or Kao Bo by King Cheng of Zhou (reigned 1042–1021  BC ). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Ku Di (庫狄) family during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) traced back to other minority ethnic groups in ancient northwestern China.

Mandarin form of the Chinese surname 邸, meaning ‘official residence’ in Chinese: (i) from placename Di (邸), the name of a county (unidentified location). (ii) said to be borne by some descendants of Kujula Kadphises (called 丘就郤 or 邸就郤 in Chinese, 30–c. 80 AD ), founder of the Kushan Empire (one branch of the Yuezhi people originating from western China) located in Central Asia during the Eastern Han dynasty (25–220 AD ).

variants.name: Chi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Dong, Yun, Cheng, Jae, Yong, Cheng Chung, Chi, Chun, Duk, Fang, Feng.  Korean Chung, Chong, Jae Hong, Moon, Myong, Pong, Shen, Yoo, Byung, Chang, Chol, Chong Hun.  Southeast Asian Phi, Hung, Ly, Tu, Denh, Do Van, Duong, Hao, Kieu, Mui, Nga, Phat.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 池, meaning ‘moat’ in ancient Chinese: (i) acquired as a surname by people who lived beside a moat. (ii) from Chi (池), said to be the name of an ancient state (of unknown location and period). (iii) from the personal name Chi (池), personal name of a son of an official in the state of Qin during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 遲, meaning ‘late’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of Chi Ren (遲任), a person who lived during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) shortened form of the Chinese compound surname Yu-Chi (尉遲), originally the name of a tribe from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iii) from the second element of the personal name Zi Chi (子遲), style name of Fan Xu, a student of Confucius (551–479  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Berta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Berta di Clavesana was born in 1182, her father, Bonifacio I del Vasto, Marquis of Clavesana, was 43 and her mother, Hélène de Bergame, was 28. She married William VI Marquess of Montferrat on 9 August 1202. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1224, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Berta di Clavesana est née en 1182, son père, Bonifacio I del Vasto, Marquis of Clavesana, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Hélène de Bergame, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé William VI Marquess of Montferrat le 9 août 1202. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1224, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Berta di Clavesana 1182 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bonifacio I del Vasto, Marquis of Clavesana 43 und ihre Mutter Hélène de Bergame 28. Sie hat am 9. August 1202 William VI Marquess of Montferrat geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1224 im Alter von 42 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Berta di Clavesana è nata il nel 1182, sua padre, Bonifacio I del Vasto, Marquis of Clavesana, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Hélène de Bergame, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato William VI Marquess of Montferrat il 9 agosto 1202. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1224, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Berta di Clavesanaが1182年に生まれた時，父Bonifacio I del Vasto, Marquis of Clavesanaは43歳，母Hélène de Bergameは28歳であった。1202年8月9日にWilliam VI Marquess of Montferratと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1224年に42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Berta di Clavesana(이)가 1182년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bonifacio I del Vasto, Marquis of Clavesana(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hélène de Bergame(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1202년 8월 9일 William VI Marquess of Montferrat(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1224년 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Berta di Clavesana nasceu em 1182, seu pai, Bonifacio I del Vasto, Marquis of Clavesana, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Hélène de Bergame, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com William VI Marquess of Montferrat em 9 de agosto de 1202. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1224, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Berta di Clavesana родилась в 1182 г., её отцу по имени Bonifacio I del Vasto, Marquis of Clavesana было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Hélène de Bergame, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William VI Marquess of Montferrat 9 августа 1202 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1224 г. в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Berta di Clavesana nació en 1182, su papá, Bonifacio I del Vasto, Marquis of Clavesana, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Hélène de Bergame, tenía 28 años. Se casó con William VI Marquess of Montferrat el 9 de agosto de 1202. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1224, a la edad de 42 años.
